title: Discover + triage >=15 candidate Ewing scRNA-seq sources
context: M0 source inventory — delivers researcher value with no partner required. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Discover and triage at least 15 candidate Ewing sarcoma scRNA-seq sources into draft SourceRecords for downstream license/access verification.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 15 candidate Ewing scRNA-seq sources identified, each captured as a draft SourceRecord.
Each candidate notes apparent access tier and retrieval URL for the verify-002 gate.
Triage output is the input list for the license/access-verification hard gate.
resources: GEO, ArrayExpress, Single Cell Portal, CELLxGENE Discover, EBI BioStudies
